tasks.label: Install Board Dependencies
tasks.detail: Installs Poetry dependencies for Board-Backend and Board-LLM, plus npm dependencies for Nimbus.

tasks.label: Nimbus: Metro (reset cache)
tasks.detail: Frees port 8081 if needed, then starts Metro with --reset-cache.

tasks.label: Board Stack: Redis + open services
tasks.detail: docker compose up -d redis (Board-Backend), then opens Backend / LLM / Metro / Android tabs. Default build (Cmd+Shift+B). For Cmd+Shift+R see .vscode/README-keybindings.md.

tasks.label: Open Board Services
tasks.detail: Opens Terminal tabs for Board-Backend, Board-LLM, Nimbus Metro with reset cache, and Nimbus Android.

tasks.label: Start Board Microservices
tasks.detail: Starts Board-Backend, Board-LLM, Nimbus Metro, and Android with health checks in one managed task using active-arch-only for faster Android debug builds.

tasks.label: Open Board Services (no install)
tasks.detail: Opens Terminal tabs only (skips poetry/npm install). Use when deps are already installed — faster than Run Board Services.

tasks.label: Run Board Services
tasks.detail: Installs dependencies, then opens Terminal tabs (no automatic docker redis in this chain — use Board Stack or start Redis first).
